llm.response_raw: {"ecutwfc_Ry": 60.0, "ecutrho_Ry": 480.0, "kpoints": [8, 8, 8], "smearing": "gaussian", "degauss_Ry": 0.005, "conv_thr_Ry": 1e-10, "mixing_beta": 0.5, "reasoning": "Ga 3d10 is in valence for SG15 ONCV, so ecutwfc needs ~55-65 Ry (60 chosen). ecutrho=4x is the NC minimum but I pick 8x=480 Ry to damp core-state wiggles from Ga 3d in charge density. k=8x8x8 matches Si density; GaAs is direct-gap at Γ so we want Γ-inclusive or well-sampled. mixing_beta=0.5 lower than Si because 3d adds charge-sloshing risk."}
